reasoning: The current market estimate of 4% from mid-October 2025 reflects the reality that OpenAI's GPT-5 presently dominates the Chatbot Arena overall leaderboard. While Anthropic recently released Claude 4.5 Sonnet in late September, it only appears to top specialized leaderboards like SWE-bench rather than the overall arena ranking. Given that Anthropic has already released several major updates in 2025 and is tracking behind OpenAI's flagship models, their only chance to take the #1 spot by December 31 would be a surprise deployment of an even more advanced model (e.g., Opus 4.5) that decisively beats GPT-5. The 4% probability accurately reflects the long-shot odds of such a late-year release occurring and successfully overtaking OpenAI's top spot within the remaining two months.
